headline: Monroe Capital Becomes Latest Private Credit Manager To Restrict Withdrawals
summary: Monroe Capital joins other private credit fund managers in capping its redemptions at 5%, as investors sought to redeem approximately 10%.

headline: Bodycote shares fall as US suitor Apollo ditches £1.5bn bid interest
summary: Macclesfield-based Bodycote said late last month it had received a conditional all-cash takeover approach from Apollo worth 885p a share.
